nasb.text: “In the first month, on the fourteenth day of the month, you shall have the Passover, a feast of seven days; unleavened bread shall be eaten.

esv.text: “In the first month, on the fourteenth day of the month, you shall celebrate the Feast of the Passover, and for seven days unleavened bread shall be eaten.

cnv.text: “正月十四日，你們要守逾越節，節期共七天，期間你們要吃無酵餅。

ccb.text: “‘一月十四日，你们要守逾越节七天，节期间要吃无酵饼。
